COOKIE_BANNER.MESSAGE: This website uses cookies to ensure you get the best experience on our website.
COOKIE_BANNER.GOOGLE_PRIVACY_DESC: For more information on how Google third-party cookies handle your data, see:
COOKIE_BANNER.NECESSARY_DETAIL: Necessary cookies are required to enable basic features of this site, such as providing secure log-in or adjusting your consent preferences. These cookies do not store any personally identifiable data.
COOKIE_BANNER.FUNCTIONAL_DETAIL: Functional cookies help perform certain functionalities like sharing the content of the website on social media platforms, collecting feedback, and other third-party features.
COOKIE_BANNER.ANALYTICS_DETAIL: Analytical cookies are used to understand how visitors interact with the website. These cookies help provide information on metrics such as the number of visitors, bounce rate, traffic source, etc.

admin.monetization.stripe-not-configured: Stripe is not configured. Please configure Stripe keys to enable monetization.
admin.monetization.stripe-description: Configure the Stripe payment gateway to accept payments.
admin.monetization.paid-account-descript: The Paid Account feature implements a subscription-based monetization model. Administrators can set a specific access price, and once paid, users receive 'Paid Account' status. This enables content differentiation, allowing authors to restrict access to exclusive materials for paid subscribers only.
admin.monetization.credits-description: The credits system is designed for one-time purchases within the platform. Users can top up their virtual currency balance to purchase individual courses, articles, or support their favorite authors. This system can be globally toggled by the administrator.
admin.monetization.what-is-description: Monetization allows you to generate revenue from your platform by providing paid services to users. In Circlo, this is implemented through a system of paid accounts and virtual credits.
admin.monetization.how-to-use-step-1: 1. Configure Stripe: Provide API keys in the Stripe section to be able to accept payments.
admin.monetization.how-to-use-step-2: 2. Choose a model: Enable Paid Accounts for a subscription model or Credits for one-time purchases.
admin.monetization.how-to-use-step-3: 3. Track transactions: All financial operations are displayed in the transactions section for easy monitoring.

studio.dangerZone.deleteAccountDesc: This will delete your account. Your account will be permanently deleted from this application
studio.performanceCookiesDesc: These cookies allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of our site. They help us to know which pages are the most and least popular and see how visitors move around the site. All information these cookies collect is aggregated and therefore anonymous. If you do not allow these cookies we will not know when you have visited our site, and will not be able to monitor its performance
studio.targetingCookiesDesc:
These cookies may be set through our site by our advertising partners. They may be used by those companies
              to build a profile of your interests and show you relevant adverts on other sites. They do not store directly
              personal information, but are based on uniquely identifying your browser and internet device. If you do not
              allow these cookies, you will experience less targeted advertising
studio.cookiePreferencesDesc: When you visit any website, it may store or retrieve information on your browser, mostly in the form of cookies. This information might be about you, your preferences or your device and is mostly used to make the site work as you expect it to. The information does not usually directly identify you, but it can give you a more personalized web experience. Because we respect your right to privacy, you can choose not to allow some types of cookies. Click on the different category headings to find out more and change our default settings. However, blocking some types of cookies may impact your experience of the site and the services we are able to offer
studio.functionalCookiesDesc:
These cookies enable the website to provide enhanced functionality and personalisation. They may be set by us or
              by third party providers whose services we have added to our pages. If you do not allow
              these cookies then some or all of these services may not function properly
studio.cookies.alwaysActiveDesc:
These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off in our systems. They are usually only set in
              response to actions made by you which amount to a request for services, such as setting your privacy preferences,
              logging in or filling in forms. You can set your browser to block or alert you about these cookies,
              but some parts of the site will not then work. These cookies do not store any personally identifiable information
